meta.wzorzec: tiktok @alisa.juki 7648994013772549390 (10.0M plays) — POV mycia czarnego auta bezprzewodowa myjka; brak talking-head
meta.idea: JEDNA idea = satysfakcjonujaca sila strumienia + reveal czystego czarnego auta (mechanizm=strumien, transformacja=czyste auto). Foam-cannon (rozowa piana wzorca) SWIADOMIE pominiety: (a) rozowa piana koliduje z czerwona tozsamoscia + AI-slop, (b) piana=najczestszy rozpad fizyki (woda->blob). Zostaja czyste strumienie.
meta.stack: caly Kling 2.5 FLF (bez twarzy -> zero OmniHuman/MC). n=2 tylko na scenach aktywnego strumienia (fizyka plynow).
meta.tozsamosc: RED+black EAFC gun z galerii Ali; NIGDY neonowo-zielony (to shop/wzorzec = inny egzemplarz).
meta.vo: krotki PL lektor (bez lip-sync, narracja nad POV) ~ELevenLabs v3

scenes.frame_brief_first: POV first-person over a right hand gripping the RED and matte-black cordless pressure washer gun (silver lance, brass collar, red nozzle tip); nozzle aimed close at a grimy dust-and-mud-caked alloy wheel of a black car; trigger just pressed, jet starting; overcast daylight; bucket with intake hose on the ground behind
scenes.frame_brief_last: SAME POV framing and gun position: a strong continuous water jet now blasts the wheel, sheets of grey grime and mud streaming off the spokes with the water, clean metal starting to show
scenes.motion: steady POV, the high-pressure water jet leaves the nozzle front along the lance axis and blasts grime off the wheel; grime and water stream off downward; subtle handheld micro-drift, no full rotation
scenes.vo_pl: Tata dostal to na Dzien Ojca...

scenes.frame_brief_first: POV: the red gun's jet aimed at the LEFT edge of a dust-filmed matte-dirty black car door panel; a continuous water jet hits the panel; the rest of the door still covered in road grime
scenes.frame_brief_last: SAME POV and gun position: the jet has swept toward the RIGHT; behind where it passed a wide GLOSSY CLEAN black stripe is revealed, wet and mirror-shiny, dirt washed downward; the un-swept part still dull and dirty
scenes.motion: the water jet sweeps left-to-right across the door; a clean glossy stripe grows behind the jet; grime runs down; continuous coherent stream, no foam, subtle handheld drift

scenes.frame_brief_first: POV lower angle: the red gun's jet aimed at the mud-caked lower rocker sill and wheel arch of the black car; thick dirt still clinging
scenes.frame_brief_last: SAME POV and gun position: the jet has blasted the sill clean; muddy water streams down onto the driveway; the rocker is now wet glossy black
scenes.motion: the jet blasts caked mud off the rocker; a curtain of muddy water sheets down under gravity; consistent water volume; no blobs, subtle handheld micro-drift

scenes.frame_brief_first: CLOSE beauty shot of the flawless CLEAN wet glossy black car door panel, deep mirror reflections of the sky in the paint, thin sheets of water running down, a few droplets; the red gun rests lowered at the bottom edge of the frame, no active jet; soft overcast daylight
scenes.frame_brief_last: SAME framing: the water has sheeted further down, more of the deep-gloss black paint reflecting the sky; a few droplets fall; the car looks showroom-clean and wet
scenes.motion: gentle: residual water sheets down the glossy black paint under gravity, a few droplets drip; slow subtle push-in, no full rotation, no active jet

scenes.frame_brief_first: HERO CLOSE-UP: the RED and matte-black pressure washer gun fills most of the frame, held up in the right hand and tilted toward the camera, the clean wet glossy black car as soft bokeh behind; a water droplet hanging on the red nozzle tip; no jet yet
scenes.frame_brief_last: SAME framing: the trigger is squeezed and a short crisp burst of water spray fires from the red nozzle tip, a few droplets flying, gun still hero in hand — product ALIVE not a dead packshot
scenes.motion: thumb pulls the trigger, a short crisp spray burst leaves the nozzle front, a couple of droplets fly; product held steady, subtle handheld drift, no full rotation

consistency.produkt: RED+black gun, silver lance, brass collar, ONE red nozzle tip, black battery, thin dark intake hose — IDENTYCZNY w kazdej scenie (master-frame + FLF-chaining). NIGDY neonowo-zielony.
consistency.auto: jeden glossy czarny sedan, ta sama lokalizacja (podjazd/trawnik) przez calosc
consistency.reka: prawa dlon trzyma pistolet+spust w kazdej scenie; lewa pusta/przytrzymuje waz; NIGDY drugi pistolet
consistency.swiatlo: miekkie pochmurne swiatlo z gory-lewej, mokry polysk na czarnym lakierze
consistency.woda: strumien wychodzi z CZOLA dyszy wzdluz osi lancy, splywa grawitacyjnie; NIGDY piana/blob; brak rozowej/kolorowej piany
consistency.napisy: brak czytelnych napisow/logo na pistolecie, akumulatorze, tablicy auta

self_accept: BRAMKA TOMKA #1 (blueprint) — operator-agent akceptuje (memory: triaz+akcept AGENTA nie Tomek; retro-akceptacja delegowana). Idea=1, 5 ciec, ujecia <=3.3s, hook<=2s, produkt widoczny od 1. klatki, fizyka plynow zaadresowana (n=2, {PHYSICS_FLUID}). AKCEPT -> generacja.
